data.title: Q&A: How Dubai South is expanding ecommerce in the region
data.description: Digital Commerce 360 speaks with Mohsen Ahmad, CEO of Dubai South, about how the city is positioning itself as a global ecommerce gateway — and what that means for American ecommerce brands seeking to expand internationally.

data.title: B2B marketplace GrubMarket acquires Coast Citrus for biggest deal yet
data.description: The move expands GrubMarket’s operational scale and adds strength to its vertically integrated supply chain, which combines sourcing, fulfillment, and technology services.

data.title: DNOW acquires MRC Global in $1.5 billion deal to expand digital supply chain
data.description: The merger strengthens DNOW’s digital commerce strategy, expands its global footprint, and bolsters ecommerce capabilities.

data.title: Wayfair introduces new Discover and Image Search features to its app
data.description: Discover and Image Search will play important roles for Wayfair customers as the retailer leverages artificial intelligence.

data.title: American Rebel Beer sees big online sales surge ahead of July 4
data.description: The company the surge to recent digital investments, including improvements to the online checkout process and the introduction of flat-rate and free shipping options.
